refnamediv.refpurpose: Generates a multipoint of random points contained in a Polygon or MultiPolygon.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: ST_GeneratePoints generates a multipoint consisting of a given number of pseudo-random points which lie within the input area. The optional seed is used to regenerate a deterministic sequence of points, and must be greater than zero.

refsection.title: Examples

caption.para: Generated a multipoint consisting of 12 Points overlaid on top of original polygon using a random seed value 1996

para.programlisting: SELECT ST_GeneratePoints(geom, 12, 1996) FROM ( SELECT ST_Buffer( ST_GeomFromText( 'LINESTRING(50 50,150 150,150 50)'), 10, 'endcap=round join=round') AS geom ) AS s;

refsection.para: Given a table of polygons s, return 12 individual points per polygon. Results will be different each time you run.
refsection.programlisting: SELECT s.id, dp.path[1] AS pt_id, dp.geom FROM s, ST_DumpPoints(ST_GeneratePoints(s.geom,12)) AS dp;
